SELECT min(A, 2) FROM (SELECT A FROM test_table UNION SELECT B FROM test_table_2) AS combined;
CREATE TABLE test_table_3 (C INT, D TEXT);
SELECT min(C, 2) FROM (SELECT C FROM test_table_3 WHERE D = 'b' UNION SELECT A FROM test_table) AS filtered;
SELECT min(A, n) FROM (SELECT A, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A) as n FROM test_table) AS numbered_rows WHERE n <= 3;
SELECT min(A, 2) FROM (SELECT A FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT E FROM additional_table) AS full_set ORDER BY A ASC;
